title: Employee Onboarding Checklist Template
summary: Build a practical onboarding checklist for small teams in minutes, then copy or download and use it immediately.
selection_rule: Match the query first, then prefer official source-backed templates with no-signup-first output.

entries.title: Employee onboarding checklist template builder
entries.first_action: Open the DayOneBuilder checklist builder, fill company/role/context fields, and click Generate checklist.
entries.smoke_test: Generate a checklist, confirm all 4 sections are present, then copy output in under 30 seconds.
entries.proof_signal: Official templates are linked from Waybook and HRCloud; trusted references and task output are visible on the same page.
entries.fallback: Use Workforce and Reddit notes if one source cannot be opened, then use the local generated structure as a practical baseline.

entries.title: Export or save the generated onboarding checklist
entries.first_action: After generation, click Copy checklist or Download .txt checklist to move it into your onboarding flow.
entries.smoke_test: Copy and download options both work without required account sign-in.
entries.proof_signal: Export actions are visible as one click actions in the same UI and are telemetry tracked as save/install intent.
entries.fallback: If export fails in the browser, copy text manually from the output panel.
